Appearances on THUR-JAN-08-2015:
Plaintiff John S. Dupen is present.
Attorney Vincent J. DeMartini for the plaintiff.
Defendant Lucky Leighton is present.
Attorney Ross J. Psyhogios appears for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The trial date of January 12, 2015 is vacated. (501/JPT)
